abstract: Integration recipe for `health_forge_strava` — the Strava REST API adapter for Health Forge. 5 read-only metrics (workouts, heart rate streams, calories, distance, elevation). Covers OAuth 2.0 PKCE with client_secret, deep-link redirect handling, dual rate limiting (15-min + daily), kJ→kcal conversion, and the StravaWorkoutExtension (sufferScore, segmentEfforts, weightedAveragePower). Recommends a backend token-exchange proxy for production. Note: code-complete with unit tests but not yet validated end-to-end against the live API.
